expectations.evidence: All 4 files present: requirements.md (295 lines), test-skeletons.md (889 lines), traceability.md (161 lines), ambiguity-report.md (275 lines)

expectations.text: User Story IDs match US-XXX-XXX format
At least 3 ACs per user story
NFRs have measurable thresholds with NFR-XXX-XXX IDs
expectations.evidence: NFR IDs use NFR-001 format (single sequence), not the vbounce-specified NFR-XXX-XXX (feature-grouped) format. 8 NFRs found with measurable thresholds.

expectations.text: Test skeleton IDs match T-AC-XXX format
expectations.evidence: Test IDs use T-001-001-01 format, not the vbounce-specified T-AC-US-XXX-XXX-XX format. IDs do not contain 'AC' prefix for traceability linking.

expectations.text: Traceability matrix links PRD -> Story -> AC -> Test with no orphans
expectations.evidence: 102 story refs, 102 AC refs in traceability matrix

summary: 6/8 assertions passed. Good structure overall but ID formats deviate from vbounce specification: NFR IDs lack feature grouping, test skeleton IDs lack T-AC- prefix for explicit traceability linking.
